jobs.name: daily-agentic-newsletter
jobs.prompt: You are Hermes Agent. Research the latest news about agentic AI assistants, autonomous agents, and AI agent frameworks from the past 24 hours. Use web_search to find 5-8 relevant articles from reputable sources (tech news sites, company blogs, research publications). For each story, also try to find a relevant image URL (e.g., company logo, product screenshot, or relevant illustration) by searching for the company name + logo or the topic + image. Extract key points and write a professional newsletter summarizing developments, trends, and insights suitable for a business audience. The newsletter should have: 1) A clear subject line with today's date, 2) Brief intro, 3) Top 3-5 stories with summaries, each including: a) headline, b) 2-3 sentence summary, c) relevance/impact for businesses, d) optional image URL or link to source, 4) Framework watch section (mention key frameworks like LangGraph, AG2, CrewAutoGen, etc. with optional logos), 5) Trend to watch, 6) By the numbers if relevant (stats, adoption rates, model releases), 7) Closing note. Use clear formatting: use headings, bold for key terms, bullet points, and embed images using markdown syntax ![Description](URL) or provide URLs. Keep it concise but informative (~400-600 words). Then send the newsletter via email to both gaurav_ajit@hotmail.com and roseandrojude@gmail.com using the configured Himalaya account (which uses Gmail credentials to send).
